title: Raid no totems
description: This datapack disable totem drop from evokers in raid. You can use this datapack on public server to increase totem cost.
body: This datapack can change game balance and pvp in your world or server. This datapack removes drop totem of undying from evokers in raid. You still can get totems by killing evokers into mansion, but with this pack totems become very rare item like enchanted golden apple
